OPPORTUNITIES CENTRE FOR INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS Global experiences can open your eyes like never before. Meeting new students from different cultures,exchanging and brainstorming ideas, can create a huge shift in the way we perceive the world. The Centre for International Relations enhances academic excellence through global collaboration offering Eshwarites, opportunities for international exposure and preparing the students and faculty members for a diverse and interconnected world. We also welcome students and faculty from overseas to come experience what it is like, to learn, or do research at our campus – be it for a short term internship or a semester with us. So come, let’s exchange an amalgam of ideas and culture, to truly experience the world, together! 50+ PARTNERSHIPS WITH TOP UNIVERSITIES WORLDWIDE 50+ INTERNATIONAL INTERNSHIPS 1000+ STUDENTS TRAINED IN INTERNATIONAL LANGUAGES 10+ GLOBAL UNIVERSITY VISITING FACULTY LEADERSHIP Mr. Kannan Narasimhan Dean – Industry & International Relations Know more Dr. M. Karthikeyan Associate Director – International & Corporate Relations Know more INTERNATIONAL ADVISORY BOARD Here is our tall line up of diverse and eminent international advisors who are an integral part of our Centre for International Relations. With their help, we gain critical insights into futuristic global trends in technology and research. They also help us gain important connections into the global arena so that we can provide the best global opportunities and exposure for our students. Dr.Raj Gururajan Professor of Information Systems, University of Southern Queensland, Australia Dr.Masaru Shimomura Professor, Graduate School of Integrated Science and Technology, Shizuoka University, Japan Dr.Subramaniam Ganesan Director, Real Time & DSP Lab., Electrical and Computer Engineering Department, Oakland University, Rochester, USA Dr.Yasuhiro Hayakawa Managing Professor, Shizuoka University, Japan Dr. Chan-Yun Yang Professor, Department of Electrical Engineering, National Taipei University, Taiwan Dr. Sri Devi Ravana Associate Professor, Department of Information Systems, University of Malaya, Malaysia Dr.Syed Abdul Rehman Khan Professor, Department of Supply Chain and Logistics Management, Tsinghua University, China Dr. Zihan Lv Associate Professor, Computer and Advance Technologies, Qingdao University, China Ts.Dr.Sumendra Yogarayan Professors & Deputy Chairperson, Centre of Intelligent Cloud Computing Faculty of Information Science and Technology Multimedia University Malaysia Dr.Siti Fatimah Binti Deputy Dean, Academic & International Relations Faculty of Information Science and Technology Multimedia University Malaysia Ms.Haslenna Hamdan Department of International Affairs, UiTM Terengganu Branch, Malaysia Dr.Mani Govindasamy Division Director & Assistant Professor , Ming Chi University of Technology , Taiwan Dr.Po-Ming Lee Distinguished Professor, Southern Taiwan University of Science and Technology, Taiwan GLOBAL ALLIANCES NEW CONNECTIONS. NEW HORIZONS. Sri Eshwar is going full throttle to make new connections with foreign universities to equip our students and faculty for the much-needed global exposure. Signing MOU is the first step to open the doors for international exchange. MOUs help facilitate the exchange of students for various programs and help gain valuable insights in problem solving and a rich cultural perspective. With our overseas partner universities, the possibilities for students to gain exposure is limitless! KNOW MORE OUTWARD MOBILITY Get set to fly off to gain global exposure - A value add to your career! Get ready to take off your career by going international, to gain new exposure like never before! Meeting and exchanging ideas with people of new cultures help open our perspective to unimaginable heights. Outward Mobility enables students to visit foreign countries for varying periods of time to gain the much needed exposure and a global perspective. SEMESTER ABROAD PROGRAM INTERNATIONAL INTERNSHIPS SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOL PROGRAM KNOW MORE INWARD MOBILITY come! experience the Indian technical brilliance & rich culture! Students wishing to make India a part of their academic pursuits, stop right here! Sri Eshwar offers Inward mobility programs that will give you a chance to work with some of the best researchers of the world, passionate faculty, and high quality students that will surely elevate your global exposure.You will surely be uplifted in your technical skills, problem solving approach, and at the same time appreciate our deep rooted culture and simple lifestyle! You are sure to gain fresh perspectives and make some new friends for life, here at Sri Eshwar. SEMESTER @ SRI ESHWAR INTERNSHIPS @ SRI ESHWAR SRI ESHWAR SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOL PROGRAM KNOW MORE INTERNATIONAL VISITING FACULTY Esteemed international visiting faculty enhance our academic programs with specialized courses, guest lectures, and collaborative research projects, enriching students’ educational experiences. The following overseas professors/industry experts regularly conduct sessions for our students both in virtual and physical modes. Mr.Harish Janakiraman MCU Engineer, Texas Instruments, Texas, USA Dr.Mahaswetha Sarkaar Senior Associate Dean, San Diego State University, California, USA Mr.Ben Davis Manager-Corporate Systems Engineering, Palo Alto Networks, USA Ms.Nivethitha Loganathan Executive Director, NCR Atleos, USA Dr.Sri Devi Ravana Associate Professor, Department of Information Systems, University of Malaya, Malaysia Prof. Dr. Ali M. Eltamaly Professor- Sustainable Energy Technologies Center, College of Engineering, King Saud University, Saudi Arabia Professor Akhtar Kalam Head of External Engagement – Victoria University, Australia Dr.Ramazan Bayindir Professor, Gazi University Technology Faculty, Turkey Dr. Ahmed Zobaa Prof & Reader in Electrical & Power Engineering, Brunel University, London, UK Dr.Herbert Ho.Ching.Lu Professor – The University of Western Australia, Australia Dr.S.Hossein Mousavinezhad Professor- College of Science and Engineering, Idaho State University, USA Dr.Fabian Maunganidze Deputy Dean Faculty of Medicine and Health Sciences, Midlands State University Zimbabwe Dr.Po-Ming Lee Distinguished Professor, Southern Taiwan University of Science and Technology, Taiwan INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS EVENTS & VISITS The Centre for International Relations (CIR) at Sri Eshwar highlights key global collaborations, student exchange programs, and leadership visits. This section showcases initiatives that strengthen ties with international institutions and promote global learning opportunities.
